notes: Creates and validates an application backup before installation and automatically restores it if post-install validation fails
Ships an independent rollback endpoint with the proven 2026.07.14.2 release; rollback does not change VPN configuration
Installs the web tree atomically, validates the running API and cleans abandoned update sessions
Replaces the memory-heavy second-Xray mass scan with TCP endpoint reachability and latency checks; the active profile still gets a full tunnel check
Does not change profile selection, XRay startup, Hysteria2, OAuth or routing logic
